description: Queue of section expansion tasks for the analyst. Each item references a curmudgeon review that found major weaknesses. The analyst writes complete replacement text, one item per run.

items.target: FOUNDATIONAL: New top-level Scoreboard tab + per-row scoreboard schema extensions (data/wins.json, data/predictions.json, new data/killshots.json). Phase 1 = 15 rows.
items.notes: FOUNDATIONAL MODEL CHANGE per HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-FOUNDATIONAL-001. Analyst draft produced 2026-04-20. Decider must (a) route to curmudgeon with REQUIRE_ADVERSARIAL_REVIEW, (b) NOT auto-integrate, (c) create tracking issue, (d) log chg-*.json per HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-PIPELINE-ROUTING-001. Hold is in effect until operator posts HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-001. The curmudgeon review is for HUMAN-GROUP CONSUMPTION only; it does NOT by itself authorise integration.
items.completion_notes: Phase 1 draft complete: 15 rows, schema spec, scoreboard tab HTML + intro paragraph copy, two formula-script skeletons (V13 Finsler Sydney-Perth + θ=−lonE) with unit tests, integration-point plan, eight anticipated objections. Status locked to draft_awaiting_human_group_review; HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-FOUNDATIONAL-001 kept status=pending per companion routing HNOTE explicit instruction.

items.notes: defense_survives=3 pivot: dome narrows claim to "pole region" (not all southern stars). Counter: (a) Canopus is at δ=-52°, well within "pole-adjacent" territory by any reasonable definition; (b) if dome energy falls off toward the rim, then all high-southern-declination stars should be dimmer — Canopus falsifies this. Analyst should add the Canopus δ=-52° fact and note the pole-region defense proves too much.

items.target: WIN-013/014 verdict reframe to Refuted by Data + new Part 6.14 κ Coupling Cluster section (operator-commissioned via HNOTE-OPERATOR-WIN-013-014-VERDICT-REFRAME-001 with 2026-05-09T20:40:35Z addendum)
items.notes: Single integrated EXP per operator preference: (1) new Part 6.14 κ Coupling Cluster section ~1847 words, 8 subsections per HNOTE addendum; (2) WIN-013 verdict Misleading→Refuted by Data with rewritten ~253-word detail_evidence; (3) WIN-014 verdict Self-Contradicted→Refuted by Data with rewritten ~300-word detail_evidence; (4) WIN-058b cross-link added, verdict unchanged at Not Demonstrated. Empirical work used Strestík 2001, Hvoždara&Prigancová 2002, Curto 2006, Tomás&Mendoza-Torres 2018, Crossley 2013 for ΔB and noise-floor citations. Per-station INTERMAGNET pulls flagged as low-priority follow-on. ISS-1870 closes with this expansion. Operator wants to read drafted verdicts before curmudgeon clears.
items.completion_notes: JSON validated. Section anchor primary: after p6-613-mond-grouping (EXP-295) closing </details>; fallback: after p6-612-11 closing </details> if EXP-295 not yet integrated.
